final:
module RefModule(
    input clk,
    input rst,
    input D,

    output reg Q
);

  wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always@(posedge clk or posedge rst or posedge dbg_halt)
begin

  if(rst)
  begin
    Q <= 0;
  end

  else
  begin
    Q <= D;
  end

end

endmodule
